metadata.title:
Startling Charge Made to Mayor and


City Council.

pages.raw_text:
He claims that in many districts
of the United States 25 per cent of
the cattle are afflicted with tuber.
culosis, and the infection is con-
stantly spreading. The heaviest
mortality from tuberculosis among
human beings Is rated among the
Indians of North Dakota and Min
nesOta, who eat raw beef.


The veterinary gives an interest
ing extract of the history of tuber-
culosis among cattle and of meas
ures that have been taken to stamp
it out He holds that the danger
from this disease through contain
mated milk is greater than danger
from fire in schools or public build
ings. Unless the officials are
aroused to their duty in this re-
gard, he argues, mothers will con-
tinue to innocently feed their deli
ctee abes on milk swarming with
millions of living germs.


The enormous death rate from
consumption is traced partly to in
fected milk.


The veterinaries say they are
taking the matter up from a health
standpoint, using the facts they
gather in their treatment Of ami
mails as a basis for the appeal to
the city government. Any assist
ance that can be supplied the Of
ficials in fight for pure milk will
be furnished free of charge.


BY the board of health Spokane
milk has been pronounced eXcep-
tionally good Coe claims he can
disprove this assumption with
plenty of actual cases. The state
is also supposed to maintain dairy
inspection and he also claims this
is farcical and Intellectual.


In regard to this question City
Health Officers Grieve said today
that the board of health had al.
ready determined to ask the coun-
Gil to enforce veterinary inspection
of all cows furnishing milk to this
city for tuberculosis symptoms,
with power to condemn such AMI
mails.


The board has no means Of test
ing milk for these germs, physical
examination of the cattle being
necessary. The board Is determined
to urge every measure that will in
sure protection from the dread dis.
ease.


1t now remains to see how seri-
ously the city council will take this
matter.
